prestazioni: Engine: M285 V12 5.5L Biturbo (engine code: M285 E55 AL) – Full internal build with forged Mahle pistons (9.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Manley Performance to handle 850+ HP. Twin Precision Turbo PT6766 CEA ball-bearing turbos with custom 44mm wastegates and a TiAL MV-R 44mm blow-off valve for instant spool and reduced lag.

Fuel System: Upgraded to a full AEM Infinity 10 EMS standalone ECU with dual Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pumps, Injector Dynamics ID2000x injectors (2000cc/min), and a custom fuel rail from Radium Engineering. Methanol injection via Snow Performance Stage 3 kit with dual nozzles for cooling and octane boost.

Drivetrain: Reinforced ZF 5HP24 5-speed automatic transmission with a Level 10 torque converter, upgraded valve body, and a Peloquin limited-slip differential. Custom driveshaft from The Driveshaft Shop with 3.5-inch chromoly tubing and CV joints rated for 1000+ lb-ft torque. Quaife ATB differential for the rear axle to eliminate wheel hop under hard launches.
estetica: Body: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion by Liberty Walk (LB-WORKS) with custom fender flares, front splitter, and rear diffuser designed specifically for the 62 S chassis. Carbon fiber hood with dual heat extractors from Seibon Carbon.

Wheels: Forged HRE FF01 wheels in a staggered 24x11.5 (front) and 24x13 (rear) setup with custom offsets to fit the widened fenders. Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (295/25 R24 front, 335/25 R24 rear) for maximum grip.

Interior: Full Alcantara and carbon fiber retrim by Saddleback Leather, including custom Recaro SPG XL seats with Schroth 6-point harnesses. Digital dash upgrade via a Motec C127 display with integrated boost, AFR, and G-force readouts. Custom roll cage by The Phirm with integrated LED ambient lighting.
